repair_reason: V1 visual review read as pseudo-font marking noise; V2 removes letter/chalk/typography burden from Meshy and asks for one clear recognition stripe plus restrained wear language.

runtime_contract.rejection_reason_for_gameplay_animation: Fused static Meshy sculpture; same vanilla-base animation limitations remain.
runtime_contract.acceptance_gate: Human cloud visual review must confirm a clear commander personality without pseudo-lettering, harsh font texture, or decorative typography.

red_build.observed: Human visual review still read the prompt-only variants as one acceptable ninja-shell tank plus lesser rejected tanks.
red_build.doctrine: When one generated texture family works, derive variants from that accepted family instead of prompting Meshy to invent unrelated commander skins.
